nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Golden-backed weaver
nodes.summary: Golden-backed weaver（Golden-backed weaver，学名 Ploceus jacksoni），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、沼泽。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They most commonly live in marshes, swamps, and in general areas of wet-land. However, more rarely, Golden-backed Weavers can also be found in forests and savannas.thumb|left|250px|From The Ibis, 1888
